title: Senior Data Centre Engineer
description:
Our client is a well established data centre and IT infrastructure company that focuses on providing carrier-neutral data centre services, network connectivity, managed services and related technology solutions.

They are looking for a motivated Senior Data Centre Engineer to support the day-to-day operations and maintenance of mission-critical data centre infrastructure. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the reliable operation, maintenance, and optimisation of data centre facilities. This role provides technical leadership in managing critical M&E infrastructure, supports service delivery excellence, and ensures compliance with safety, operational, and regulatory standards.

Key Responsibilities

Data Centre Operations & Reliability

  • Oversee day-to-day operations of critical infrastructure including power, cooling, fire suppression, and monitoring systems.
  • Ensure high availability and resilience of all active and redundant systems.
  • Lead response to alarms, incidents, and emergencies, performing root cause analysis and corrective actions.

Maintenance & Engineering

  • Plan, supervise, and execute preventive and corrective maintenance activities.
  • Review maintenance procedures and implement improvements to enhance system reliability and efficiency.
  • Manage testing of backup systems (UPS, generators, switchgear, CRAC, etc.).

Technical Leadership

  • Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers and technicians.
  • Act as escalation point for complex technical issues.
  • Support audits, certifications, and compliance initiatives (e.g. ISO, SS 564, Uptime).

Customer & Stakeholder Support

  • Coordinate customer installations, move-ins, turn-ons, and infrastructure changes.
  • Ensure contracted SLAs and KPIs are met or exceeded.
  • Liaise with internal teams, vendors, and customers to support operational requirements.

Projects & Change Management

  • Support data centre projects, upgrades, and capacity expansion works.
  • Review technical designs, method statements, and risk assessments.
  • Oversee contractors and ensure works are carried out safely and in accordance with standards.

Safety, Compliance & Reporting

  • Ensure strict adherence to workplace safety, SOPs, and regulatory requirements.
  • Prepare incident reports, operational logs, and performance reports.
  • Participate in shift coverage and on-call rotation as required.

Requirements

  • Willing to work 24/7 rotating shifts
  • Willing to work at both locations
  • At least 4-5 years of relevant experience for a data centre

Work Locations

Bedok/Woodlands

(Rotation of location will be required)

Working Hours

Morning Shift: 8.30am - 8.30pm

Night Shift: 8.30pm - 8.30am

(Shifts will rotate every 2 weeks)

Shift pattern: work 3 days rest 3 days, work 2 days rest 2 days

Salary

Up to $5500

Benefits

AWS, Variable Bonus, Allowances, Flexi benefits, 21 days annual leave

Interested candidates kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Search Avenue Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
